data.body: OPERATOR ATTESTATION (2026-07-11, concrete): the fsck reconciliation was applied via two commits on the tickets orphan branch —  — which retired all 13 orphan EDIT files to .json.retired and (with rm) dropped the 4 local phantom dirs 110e/957d/9fa4/cf5d. Verified by running 'rebar fsck' from the main-2d1524ad8 (ENQUEUE_ENRICH-era) binary: result 'fsck complete: no issues found' (0 orphan_event, 0 missing_create, down from 17). A single-process library read of all 13 orphan tickets before vs after the change is byte-identical: all status=closed; assignee='' for 183e/7522/7e48/95dc/ba2c/baf7/c156/d6cc/e6f9/e8eb/fa98 and assignee='Joe Oakhart' for cc5b/f112. tickets branch pushed to origin (fsck push_pending cleared).
